cards.title: Hotel team
cards.body: Set up property content, rates, packages, and Booking Engine paths.

cards.title: Partner

cards.title: Developer

items.question: Who can sign up for Wink?
items.answer: Hotels, Partners, and platform teams can start a Wink signup path. The setup route depends on the role.

items.question: Should hotels request a demo or sign up?
items.answer: Hotels can sign up when they are ready to start setup. A demo is better when the team wants to discuss channel strategy first.

items.question: Do Partners use the same setup path as hotels?
items.answer: No. Partners need a demand-side path focused on bookable assets, storefronts, attribution, and commercial terms.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
